action: Schedule execution of steps 1 to 7 every 3 hours to continuously generate fresh singing videos, maintain an array of available videos with timestamps, and clean up expired content.
fallback_action: If scheduling fails, retry automatically and alert the system agent if repeated failures occur.

recipe.steps: Schedule a job to run every 3 hours that automatically performs all preceding actions: select avatar, check for video in progress, generate lyrics/script, create singing script, generate and monitor AI video, save all metadata, and clean up expired content.

scheduled_tasks.job_description: Automatically execute steps 1–7 to generate and track singing content, maintain video array, and remove expired videos every 3 hours.
